hero.title: Ace Your HTML/CSS/JS Interview
hero.description: Prepare for frontend web developer interviews with topic-wise guides, coding challenges, responsive design concepts, and real-world scenarios used by top tech companies.

html5 & semantics.description: Master semantic HTML, forms, SEO, accessibility, and modern HTML5 APIs.

css fundamentals & layout.description: Deep dive into selectors, box model, flexbox, grid, positioning, and animations.

javascript core concepts.description: Variables, functions, arrays, objects, closures, hoisting, and execution context.

dom manipulation & events.description: DOM traversal, event handling, event delegation, dynamic content, and forms.

es6+ modern javascript.description: Arrow functions, destructuring, spread/rest, modules, promises, and async/await.

responsive web design.description: Mobile-first approach, media queries, fluid grids, responsive images, and units.

browser apis & storage.description: localStorage, sessionStorage, Fetch API, Web Workers, geolocation, and canvas.

css frameworks & preprocessors.description: Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, Sass, SCSS, and utility-first design patterns.

performance & optimization.description: Lazy loading, code splitting, critical CSS, web vitals, and asset optimization.

accessibility & seo.description: ARIA labels, semantic HTML, keyboard navigation, alt text, and meta tags.

testing & debugging.description: Chrome DevTools, console methods, breakpoints, and unit testing with Jest.

frontend coding challenges.description: Real interview questions, UI components, and interactive application builds.

seo.title: HTML CSS JavaScript Interview Preparation Guide | Frontend Developer
seo.description: Comprehensive interview preparation for frontend web developer roles: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript ES6+, DOM manipulation, responsive design, browser APIs, and real-world coding challenges.
